title: Amar Nodi
description: A system of two mobile apps and a web admin panel for people in Bangladesh to report issues with the country's water resources. It was funded by the government.

myRole.title: Full Stack Developer and Team Lead
myRole.description: I managed the team, assigned tasks, reviewed and managed the codebase with git, wrote the entire backend, and built many mobile app features.

features: User authentication with JWT and phone OTP.
Google Maps integration for reporting location.
Creating reports with location, images, and audio.
Viewing reports based on search filters.
Built with a layered Express API architecture.

title: Section Selector UIU
description: At university, I found it really annoying to choose class timings before each trimester. I had to look through all the section times for the courses I wanted and manually figure out a routine that worked for me, so I made this helper app.
features: UIU students can enter their sections and their respective times.

title: Attache Admin Portal
description: This is an admin portal I built for a client on Upwork.
features: Admin authentication and management of users, videos and servers.
